koushik.answer: The document contains information regarding the financial condition, results of operations, and cash flows of the registrant, as well as details about controls and procedures, legal proceedings, risk factors, unregistered sales of equity securities, and other relevant information. It also includes exhibits and a signature section, along with a statement about the responsibility of certifying officers for establishing and maintaining disclosure controls and procedures. Additionally, it references Inline XBRL Taxonomy Extension documents.

koushik.answer: NVIDIA Corporation, commonly referred to as NVDA, is a data center-scale AI infrastructure company headquartered in Santa Clara, California. It was incorporated in California in April 1993 and later reincorporated in Delaware in April 1998. The company operates in two segments: "Compute & Networking" and "Graphics."

The document contains a certification for Mr. Koushik Pratim Sarma, stating that he was associated with Neural Web as a Data Science Intern from February 10, 2026, to May 12, 2026. It outlines his responsibilities during the internship, which included data collection and preprocessing, exploratory data analysis, machine learning model development, model evaluation, and supporting AI-driven solutions for business and technical requirements. The document also highlights his strong analytical abilities, interest in emerging technologies, professionalism, dedication, and ability to work both independently and in a team environment. Additionally, it mentions that his contributions were appreciated by the team and expresses confidence in his future endeavors.

Koushik Pratim Sarma is an individual who was associated with the organization Neural Web as a Data Science Intern from 10 February 2026 to 12 May 2026. During his internship, he worked on various projects related to Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, demonstrating strong analytical abilities and a proactive approach to learning. His responsibilities included data collection, preprocessing, exploratory data analysis, machine learning model development, and supporting AI-driven solutions. He was recognized for his sincerity, hard work, and commitment to delivering quality work.
